# discord_server (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord guild (server) by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_server" "main" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
}

output "server_name" {
  value = data.discord_server.main.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `afk_channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the AFK channel.
- `afk_timeout` (Number) AFK timeout in seconds.
- `description` (String) Guild description.
- `icon_hash` (String) Guild icon hash.
- `name` (String) Guild name.
- `owner_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the owner.
- `preferred_locale` (String) Preferred locale.
- `premium_progress_bar_enabled` (Boolean) Whether the boost progress bar is enabled.
- `rules_channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the rules channel.
- `splash_hash` (String) Invite splash hash.
- `system_channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the system channel.
- `verification_level` (Number) Verification level.
